evals.prompt: I need to upgrade my .NET for Android SparkScan app from Scandit SDK v6 to v7. Here is my current Activity: ActivityV6.cs.
evals.expected_output: The skill renames v6-era SparkScan APIs: TorchButtonVisible → TorchControlVisible, SoundModeOn → SoundEnabled, HapticModeOn → HapticEnabled. Removes ContinuousCaptureTimeout (deleted in v7). Replaces the v6 SparkScanFeedback POCO assigned to sparkScan.Feedback with the v7 ISparkScanFeedbackDelegate assigned to sparkScanView.Feedback (using SparkScanBarcodeSuccessFeedback / SparkScanBarcodeErrorFeedback). It does NOT rename new SparkScan(settings) — the .NET constructor is unchanged.

assertions.text: sparkScanView.TorchButtonVisible is replaced with sparkScanView.TorchControlVisible
viewSettings.SoundModeOn is replaced with viewSettings.SoundEnabled (a bool)
viewSettings.HapticModeOn is replaced with viewSettings.HapticEnabled (a bool)
viewSettings.ContinuousCaptureTimeout is removed (no replacement; controlled internally)
sparkScan.Feedback = new SparkScanFeedback { ... } is removed
The SparkScanFeedback POCO (with Success / Error Feedback properties) is no longer present in the updated code
A class implementing ISparkScanFeedbackDelegate is introduced (or the activity itself implements it)
GetFeedbackForBarcode(Barcode) is implemented and returns SparkScanBarcodeSuccessFeedback / SparkScanBarcodeErrorFeedback
sparkScanView.Feedback is assigned to the delegate instance (not sparkScan.Feedback)
new SparkScan(settings) is preserved (not renamed to SparkScan.Create or anything else)
new SparkScanSettings() is preserved
ISparkScanListener.OnBarcodeScanned / OnSessionUpdated callbacks (or the BarcodeScanned event subscription) are preserved
sparkScanView.OnPause() / OnResume() lifecycle calls are preserved
The migration guide URL (https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/net/android/migrate-6-to-7/) is provided

evals.prompt: I'm upgrading my Scandit .NET Android SparkScan SDK from v7 to v8. What do I need to change in my code?
evals.expected_output: The skill explains that v8 requires explicit SDK initialization in a MainApplication subclass — ScanditCaptureCore.Initialize() and ScanditBarcodeCapture.Initialize() must be called from OnCreate(). The SparkScan factory pattern (new SparkScan(settings)) is unchanged. Provides the v7→v8 migration guide URL.

assertions.text: The skill explains that SDK 8.0+ requires explicit initialization via ScanditCaptureCore.Initialize() and ScanditBarcodeCapture.Initialize()
The skill instructs the user to create (or update) a MainApplication subclass decorated with [Application] (or class extending Android.App.Application) and override OnCreate()
The initialization calls go into MainApplication.OnCreate() (or equivalent process-startup hook), not into MainActivity.OnCreate()
The skill does NOT instruct the user to replace new SparkScan(settings) with anything else — the .NET SparkScan constructor is unchanged in v7→v8
The skill does NOT instruct the user to add a sparkScan AddMode/RemoveMode call (that is a cross-platform native SDK change, not .NET Android)
Migration guide URL (https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/net/android/migrate-7-to-8/) is provided
